DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT ALLAN PHILLIPS MTN TO COMPEL PLTF'S VERIFIED RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS SET ONE IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL SERVE VERIFIED RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTIONS, TO DEFENDANTS' FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE, AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND THINGS, SET ONE, ON OR BEFORE SEPTEMBER 15, 2014. THE REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY $450.00 TO DEFENDANT. THE REQUEST FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DENNIS HYDE; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-06-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

DEFENDANT ALLAN PHILLIPS Motion For Terminating Sanctions is taken off calendar per moving parties' request; dismissal filed. Judge Pro Tem: Conor Moore; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

ARBITRATOR JURISDICTION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Nov-14-2014 Off Calendar

ORDER TO ARBITRATION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Aug-29-2014 Set To Order To Arbtitration Calendar

ASSIGN TO ARBITRATION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Aug-18-2014 Select Panel Of Arbitrators

Ntc Of Def'S Mtn To Compel Pltf'S Verified Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, Special Interrogatories, Set One And Request For Production Of Documents Set One; Request For Monetary And/Or Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-14-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Brenda Lipscomb, in pro per, Tel. 415.994.9498, for plaintiff and opposing party;
Leeh Dibello, of Low, Ball & Lynch, Tel. 415.981.6630, for defendant and moving party;
No other appearances.

Argued. RULING: DEFENDANT ALLAN PHILLIPS Mtn To Compel Pltf'S Verified Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, Special Interrogatories, Set One And Request For Production Of Documents Set One is granted. Plaintiff shall serve verified responses, without objections, to defendants' Form Interrogatories, Set One, and Request for Production of Documents and Things, Set One, on or before September 15, 2014. The Request For Monetary Sanctions is granted. Plaintiff shall pay $450.00 to defendant. The Request for Terminating Sanctions is denied. Order Signed. Judge Pro Tem: Dennis Hyde; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-05-2014 Assigned To Arbitration On Aug-18-14
